rules_locked.weekly_highlights: Current week only. Specific dated events and measurable transportation friction. Max 4. Mooney's remains a weekly featured venue.
rules_locked.venue_specials: Specific dated events, bands, concerts, recurring verified venue anchors, or provided venue flyers.
rules_locked.revenue_filter_rule: Only include events likely to create parking, alcohol, late-night, crowd, or group transportation demand.
rules_locked.friction_logic: Event overlap, parking pressure, late exits, weather and venue clustering belong in decision_triggers.
rules_locked.expired_cleanup: Remove events before June 15 unless required for operational context.
rules_locked.future_watch: Maintain major future events separately from current-week demand.

metro_sports: June 16–19 — OKC Comets vs Sacramento River Cats @ Chickasaw Bricktown Ballpark
local_updates: Jazz in June runs June 18–20 in Norman.
Norman Juneteenth Festival is June 19 at Reaves Park from 6–10 PM.
OKC Comets host Sacramento River Cats June 16–19 at Chickasaw Bricktown Ballpark.
Ella Langley plays OKC Zoo Amphitheatre on June 18.
Lupe Fiasco plays OKC Zoo Amphitheatre on June 20.
Friends of Friends features The Country Shop Band, The Stars Band, and Almost Yesterday this week.
Hell N Back plays The Alley on June 19.
Dirty Red and Soulshakers play The Alley on June 20.
Bingo Loco is at Tower Theatre on June 19.
Please Don't Destroy Live is at Tower Theatre on June 20.
Mooney's remains a featured weekly venue with Friday/Saturday live music and Sunday Funday activity.
weather_watch: Mid-June heat and scattered storm chances may affect outdoor festivals, concerts, venue timing and evening traffic.
